title: Simply Ice Boat Racing
body:
![BoatLabs Mod Banner](https://cdn.boatlabs.net/images/modrnith_simply_banner2.png) ##  
 
**Simply Ice Boat Racing** is a lightweight, performance-focused modpack carefully designed to deliver the smoothest and most practical experience for [Minecraft Ice Boat Racing](https://discord.gg/xWbckTc459) enthusiasts. Whether you're just starting out or grinding milliseconds on time trials, this pack gives you all the core tools you need—without the bloat. It includes essential client-side racing mods trusted by the competitive community, along with a clean, optimized foundation built for speed, precision, and customization. ## ![What it looks like](https://cdn.boatlabs.net/images/modrnith_simply_pic1.png) ##
 
- ⏱️ **Essential racing mods** — _including popular mods like [BoatCam](https://modrinth.com/mod/boatcam), [OpenBoatUtils](https://modrinth.com/mod/openboatutils) and [BoatLabs Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/boatlabsmod)_ - 📈 **High performance mods** — _based on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)_ - 🪽 **Mega lightweight** — solid base foundation for your boat racing modpack! - 💄 **Make it your own** — add your own mods: [BBBoatHud](https://modrinth.com/mod/bb_boat_hud), [Racing Scoreboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/racing-scoreboard) ## ![What it looks like](https://cdn.boatlabs.net/images/modrnith_simply_1.png) ##
